YOUSIFMOD-COMMON_ATTACK_CARD.title: Common Attack
YOUSIFMOD-COMMON_DEFEND_CARD.title: Common Defend
YOUSIFMOD-COMMON_DEBUFF_CARD.title: Common Debuff
YOUSIFMOD-DEFEND_YOUSIF.title: Defend
YOUSIFMOD-DEVOUR_CARD.title: Devour
YOUSIFMOD-DEVOUR_CARD.description:
Whenever an Attack deals unblocked damage, heal {Heal:diff()} HP.
You can no longer gain [gold]Block[/gold] from cards.
YOUSIFMOD-GLUTTON_CARD.title: Glutton
YOUSIFMOD-GLUTTON_CARD.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If [gold]Fatal[/gold], permanently increase this card's damage by {Increase:diff()}.
YOUSIFMOD-RARE_ATTACK_CARD.title: Rare Attack
YOUSIFMOD-RARE_DEFEND_CARD.title: Rare Defend
YOUSIFMOD-RARE_DEBUFF_CARD.title: Rare Debuff
YOUSIFMOD-STRIKE_YOUSIF.title: Strike
YOUSIFMOD-UNCOMMON_ATTACK_CARD.title: Uncommon Attack
YOUSIFMOD-UNCOMMON_DEFEND_CARD.title: Uncommon Defend
YOUSIFMOD-UNCOMMON_DEBUFF_CARD.title: Uncommon Debuff
YOUSIFMOD-DICE_ROLL_CARD.title: Dice Roll
YOUSIFMOD-DICE_ROLL_CARD.description:
Deal 7-15 damage.
If this card is autoplayed, deal 15 damage instead.
YOUSIFMOD-COIN_FLIP_CARD.title: Coin Flip
YOUSIFMOD-COIN_FLIP_CARD.description:
Gain energy equal to {EnergyMultiplier} times this card's energy cost.
Whenever this card is drawn, its cost randomizes between {MinCost:diff()} and {MaxCost}.
